Big funds like BlackRock, Morgan Stanley, and Goldman Sachs increase GME stakes in Q4, totaling 143M shares valued at $4.5B. GameStop holds $4.6B in cash. New 10-Q filing suggests GameStop planning BTC purchase. UBS increased GME stake by 1635%, Citadel by 52%, BlackRock by 8%. Renaissance Technologies and JPMorgan Chase reduced their stakes by 57% and 56%.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, big billion-dollar funds increased their stakes in GameStop Corp. (NYSE: GME). The video game retailer had $4.616 billion in cash and cash equivalents in the third quarter. About 143 million shares valued at $4.5 billion were held by 356 funds as of the fourth quarter 13F filings. UBS Group AG increased its stake by 1635% while Citadel Advisors added 52%, and BlackRock added 8%, valuing their stake at $1.091 billion. Renaissance Technologies and JPMorgan Chase reduced their stakes by 57% and 56%, respectively. GameStop is reportedly planning to buy Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies. More details can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: Miguel Morel, the Founder and CEO of Arkham, is scheduled to deliver a speech at the Paris Blockchain Week on April 11, 2025. During the event, Morel will share important industry insights related to the cryptocurrency sector.

news.headline: GenScript Biotech Corp commits to aggressive carbon emission reduction goals verified by SBTi, a major sustainability milestone.
news.summary: In Piscataway, New Jersey, on February 18, 2025, GenScript Biotech Corp, a prominent figure in the field of life sciences research and manufacturing services, revealed their dedication to ambitious carbon emission reduction objectives. These targets have undergone validation by the Science Based Targets initiative.

news.headline: Russia and US delegations start meeting in Riyadh.
Hackers impersonated Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman to promote a scam coin, causing it to crash 58%.
news.summary: Scammers targeted Saudi Arabia's Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman by impersonating him to promote a fake meme coin on Monday. The incident involved the hacking of the Saudi Law Conference's X account, where posts endorsing the supposed Official Saudi Arabia Memecoin were made before being taken down. The hackers went as far as updating the account with the crown prince's name and photo to lend credibility to the fraudulent scheme. The Saudi Law Conference's Twitter account was confirmed to have been hijacked and repurposed, with clarification that there is no official Saudi coin. The full details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Sivers Semiconductors appoints Alexander McCann as Strategic Senior Advisor with over 20 years of experience. (Characters: 107)
news.summary: A highly experienced executive with over 20 years of leadership in Global Operations, Manufacturing, and Supply Chain has joined Sivers Semiconductors AB (STO: SIVE) based in KISTA, Sweden. This semiconductor company specializes in photonics and wireless technologies. The appointment was announced on February 18, 2025.

China's tech sector grows rapidly globally: breakthroughs in AI, high-performance computing.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in Beijing, a report highlighted China's rapid technological advancements on the global stage. The country's technology sector is experiencing unprecedented growth in areas such as artificial intelligence, high-performance computing, and other foundational technologies. This surge in innovation is propelling China forward at remarkable speed in the digitalization and intelligent development era. The progress signifies a significant increase in China's technological capabilities and global competitiveness in this rapidly evolving landscape.

BioArctic AB's partner Eisai has reached €200 million in sales for Leqembi®, achieving the first sales milestone.
news.summary: In Stockholm on February 18, 2025, BioArctic AB's (publ) partner Eisai informed the former that the initial sales milestone as per the licensing agreement has been achieved. This milestone was attained as sales of Leqembi reached €200 million with Eisai. BioArctic AB's stock is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm under the ticker symbol BIOA B.

news.headline: Gentoo Media Inc. posts record high Q4 revenue of EUR 35.9 million, marking 16th consecutive quarter of growth.
news.summary: Gentoo Media Inc. has ended the year on a high note, achieving another record-breaking quarter with EUR 35.9 million in revenue, making it the 16th consecutive period of all-time high earnings for the company. The financial report for Q4 2024 was presented from ST JULIANS, Malta on Feb. 18, 2025.

news.headline: Farmfront partners with BF Group to supply irrigation to BFI subsidiary, aiding BF Group's global expansion.
news.summary: Farmfront Group, a leading global provider of irrigation solutions, recently announced a strategic partnership with BF International Best Fields Best Foods Limited (BFI), a subsidiary of BF S.p.A. group. Backed by investment firm Carlyle (NASDAQ: CG), the partnership involves a supply agreement to offer irrigation services to BFI. The aim of the agreement is to aid BF Group's global expansion efforts and assist in agricultural advancement.

news.headline: Infleqtion showcases 16x16 neutral atom array in UK, a key step towards scalable quantum computing.
news.summary: Infleqtion, a prominent company in quantum information technologies based in Oxford, England, has reached a significant milestone in the SQALE project. They have successfully demonstrated a 16x16 neutral atom array, which is the largest array of its kind in the UK. This accomplishment marks an essential advancement towards developing scalable quantum processors to facilitate fault-tolerant quantum computing. This achievement is a significant step in the field of quantum technology and demonstrates a breakthrough in the UK quantum computing sector.

news.headline: CJ Bioscience to present preclinical data on inflammatory bowel disease candidate CJRB-201 at ECCO 2025, targeting clinical entry in 2026. Unique Faecalibacterium strain shows potent anti-inflammatory effects and induces highest levels of Tregs among strains.
news.summary: A unique strain known as CJRB-201 belonging to the Faecalibacterium genus has shown remarkable anti-inflammatory properties. This strain exhibits the highest activation of regulatory T cells (Tregs) compared to other strains studied. Various preclinical trials conducted on several animal species have revealed substantial enhancements in crucial disease markers.

news.headline: Equinor ASA (OSE:EQNR, NYSE:EQNR) is buying back shares for employee share programmes.
news.summary: Information has been disclosed regarding transactions conducted within Equinor ASA's buy-back initiative. The program, under the tickers OSE:EQNR and NYSE:EQNR, involves the acquisition of shares to be utilized in employee and management incentive schemes. Important numbers and details pertaining to the buy-back activities have been shared, showcasing the company's efforts in strengthening its employee compensation strategies.

news.headline: Renault Group's Fireman Access, an exclusive innovation, now offers a free license for use.
news.summary: Recently, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.8%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. This decrease is significant as it represents a decrease of 0.3% from the previous quarter. The number of employed individuals has also increased by 250,000, bringing the total number of employed individuals to 30 million. Additionally, the economy has seen a growth rate of 2.5% in the last quarter, indicating positive economic development. These figures highlight a positive trend in the country's economy and job market.

GoldHaven promotes gold potential at 100%-owned Copeçal Gold Project in Brazil's Juruena Gold Province.
news.summary: GoldHaven has emphasized the considerable gold potential of its Copeçal Gold Project, which it fully owns. The project is situated in the promising Juruena Gold Province in Brazil, known for its rich mineral resources. This move underscores the company's commitment to exploring and capitalizing on the lucrative opportunities present in the region.

news.headline: Check Point Software prioritizes prevention in cloud security with CloudGuard, excelling in WAF & API security.
news.summary: Check Point CloudGuard has been acknowledged for its exceptional performance in Web Application Firewall (WAF) and API security, as well as threat prevention. It has demonstrated strong capabilities in providing cloud security solutions. Recognized for excellence, Check Point CloudGuard stands out in the industry for its reliable performance and effectiveness in safeguarding against cyber threats.

Truecaller reports 23% increase in net sales to SEK 522.8 million in year-end report, showing revenue and profit growth.
news.summary: In the year-end report for January to December 2024, Truecaller, a prominent global platform for contact verification and spam call blocking, announced a substantial 23% rise in net sales to SEK 522.8 million from SEK 424.7 million. This increase marks a significant growth for the company, reflecting its continued success in the market.
